caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in front of a white background featuring a logo that reads "EMPIRE HUSTLE" accompanied by several stars. To his right, a screen displays the words "BOSS TALK 101". He wears a gold chain around his neck and a black shirt with the text "CHECK IT" visible across the chest. On-screen overlays include a "BOSS TALK 101" logo and a "PODCAST" icon. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and continues speaking; in the final moments, he gestures with his right hand to emphasize his point. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man as he interacts with an unseen interlocutor.
